question: 在Ariba系统（通过SAP GUI执行ABAP程序）中配置错误消息时，若需为“授权错误”这一具体业务异常场景设置一条处理类错误（PRE）消息，应选择哪个Error Category值？并说明该值的构成逻辑及其与文档中所列其他PRE子类型（如PRE.VAE）的命名一致性依据。
ground_truth: 应选择 Error Category 值为 **PRE.AUE**。
context:
Procedure
1. Run the transaction code SE38.
The ABAP Editor: Initial Screen screen appears.
2. Enter /SAPPO/SYS_VALUES_DISPLAY as the name of the Program.
3. Click Execute
The Display System Settings page appears.
4. Select Software Components and click Execute.
5. Verify whether the configured entries are available or not.
6. Return to Display System Settings page
7. Repeat steps 4 and 5 for each of the following settings:
• Business Processes
• Object Types
Configuring Error Messages
The error messages are categorized into processing errors (PRE), determination and conversion (DCE), and error
conflict (CON). You cannot add or delete an error category. However, you can configure error messages for each
error category.
Context
Configure an error message for an error category. Enter information for the following fields:
• Application Area - Specify the application area of the error message that you want to configure.
• MsgNo - Specify the message number of the error message.
• Error Category - Specify a value corresponding to the error category.
Error Category Description Value
Processing error (PRE) Authorization error PRE.AUE
Value error PRE.VAE

question: 当用户在Ariba文档中点击一个带有“外部网站”图标（即表明链接指向非SAP托管网站）的超链接时，根据文档中的法律免责声明，用户需同意哪些关键条款？这些条款分别涉及内容归属、产品主张限制、SAP对链接内容的态度与担保责任，以及SAP的法律责任边界，请综合说明。
ground_truth: 当用户点击带有“外部网站”图标（即指向非SAP托管网站）的超链接时，根据文档中的《Important Disclaimers and Legal Information》，用户需同意以下四项关键条款：
context:
Important Disclaimers and Legal Information
Hyperlinks
Some links are classified by an icon and/or a mouseover text. These links provide additional information.
About the icons:
•
Links with the icon : You are entering a Web site that is not hosted by SAP. By using such links, you agree (unless expressly stated otherwise in your agreements
with SAP) to this:
•
The content of the linked-to site is not SAP documentation. You may not infer any product claims against SAP based on this information.
•
SAP does not agree or disagree with the content on the linked-to site, nor does SAP warrant the availability and correctness. SAP shall not be liable for any
damages caused by the use of such content unless damages have been caused by SAP's gross negligence or willful misconduct.
•
Links with the icon : You are leaving the documentation for that particular SAP product or service and are entering an SAP-hosted Web site. By using such links,
you agree that (unless expressly stated otherwise in your agreements with SAP) you may not infer any product claims against SAP based on this information.
Videos Hosted on External Platforms

question: 在将SAP Ariba采购集成从旧版Ariba Cloud Integration Adapter迁移至SAP Integration Suite（含Managed Gateway for Spend Management）或SAP Business Network的过程中，若原有集成中已实现CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE方法以处理供应商响应变更（如对采购订单的确认/拒绝），该方法是否仍可继续使用？若不可用，其根本原因是什么？这对企业迁移路径和集成设计会产生哪些关键影响？
ground_truth: CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE方法在SAP Integration Suite、Managed Gateway for Spend Management以及SAP Business Network中**不可用**，且已被明确弃用。其根本原因是：新版集成架构（基于SAP Integration Suite及托管网关）采用标准化、事件驱动的API模型与预定义的集成内容（如SAP BTP Integration Suite中的Spend Management integration content），不再支持旧版Ariba Cloud Integration Adapter中依赖的、面向会话（session-based）和状态化（stateful）的自定义ABAP RFC方法（如CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE）。该方法原设计用于SAP ERP/S/4HANA与Ariba Cloud Integration Adapter之间的紧耦合RFC通信，而新架构强制推行松耦合、REST/OData优先、无状态的消息交换范式，并通过预置的“Purchase Order Response”事件流（如via SAP Business Network’s PO Acknowledgement APIs）替代人工干预式响应处理。因此，企业在迁移时必须重构集成逻辑——停用所有对CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE的调用，改用SAP官方提供的标准事件订阅机制（如通过SAP Integration Suite订阅SAP Business Network发出的`PurchaseOrderAcknowledgementCreated`事件），并基于OData V4 API（如`/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV`或SAP Business Network Partner API）实现响应数据的同步与状态更新；否则将导致集成中断、响应丢失及采购闭环流程断裂。此变更已在《Migration Guide》第76页明确列为关键不兼容项（"The method CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE is not available..."），属于必须在迁移前完成代码适配与端到端测试的核心技术依赖项。
context:
The method CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE is not available with SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend
management and SAP Business Network. If you have implemented the CHANGE_SES_RESPONSE method while
integrating this transaction with your SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA using SAP Ariba network adapter, you must
SAP Integration Suite, Managed Gateway for Spend Management and SAP Business Network
Migration Guide
76 PUBLIC Migrating from SAP Ariba Cloud Integration Adapter

question: 用于重新发送质量检验文档的事务代码是什么？
context:
Resending the Quality Inspection Documents
Use this procedure to resend the quality inspection documents.
Context
In some cases, when the buyer sends the quality inspection documents to SAP Business Network and they fail
due to technical reasons. Buyers can send the quality inspection documents again from the SAP ERP system by
running the program ARBCIG_RESEND_QINSP_REQ_CRTD.
Procedure
1. Run the transaction code ARBCIG_QINS_RESEND.
2. Enter the details for the inspection lots in the Inspection Lot field.
3. Click Execute.
Implementing the BAdI for Quality Inspection Review
Use this procedure to implement the BAdI for quality inspection review.
Context
Implement the BAdI QE_SAVE to send the reviewed status (accepted or rejected) for the characteristics of the
material item to suppliers on SAP Business Network. As a buyer, you can lock or unlock the characteristics for the
material item in an inspection lot after reviewing the inspection result and send the information to SAP Business
Network through the in the QualityInspectionRequest cXML document.
Use the transaction code QE51N to lock the result for a specific characteristic. When you lock the results, this

question: 在配置从SAP S/4HANA Cloud或SAP S/4HANA发送文档到SAP Business Network时，需要对每种所需文档类型执行什么操作？
ground_truth: 重复该配置过程（即“Use this procedure to configure the documents…”）针对每种所需的文档类型。
context:
• You have signed in to SAP Integration Suite.
• You have downloaded the Automation of Source-to-Pay with SAP Business Network (42K) Using SAP
Integration Suite package to your Design workspace.
• You have created a package in your workspace to copy the integration flows.
• You have created user credentials for inbound and outbound communication.
Context
Use this procedure to configure the documents sent from SAP S/4HANA Cloud or SAP S/4HANA to SAP Business
Network. Repeat the procedure for each of the document types required in your business scenario. For example, if
your business scenario involves request for quotation and purchase order documents, repeast this procedure for
the Request for Quotation and Purchase Order artifacts.
Procedure
1. In the Automation of Source-to-Pay with SAP Business Network (42K) Using SAP Integration Suite
package, copy the required artifact to the package that you've created in your Design workspace. For more
information on the artifacts, see Artifacts in the Automation of Source-to-Pay with SAP Business Network
(42K) Using SAP Integration Suite Package [page 733].
SAP Integration Suite, Managed Gateway for Spend Management and SAP Business Network

question: 在SAP Process Integration中，配置集成场景的最后一步是什么？
ground_truth: 激活新创建的集成场景。
context:
Activating the Integration Scenario
Context
The final configuration step in SAP Process Integration is to activate your newly created scenario.
Procedure
Using the Change List tab on the main application screen, activate all the Change Lists containing the objects
created and modified during the component setup.
This completes the configuration of the integration scenarios in SAP Process Integration.
Linking Multiple SAP ERP Instances with SAP Business
Network and SAP Ariba Procurement solutions
If your organization has more than one instance of SAP ERP, you can link them to a SAP Business Network and
SAP Ariba Procurement solutions. This feature allows all the documents to be routed between a particular SAP ERP
instance, and SAP Business Network or SAP Ariba Procurement solutions.
Buying organization or service provider accounts must be enabled for Multi-ERP implementation by SAP Business
Network Support. The required configuration sections will not be available for accounts that have not been
enabled.
Document Routing Mechanism for SAP Business Network [page 105]
Multi-ERP Configuration [page 106]
Document Routing Mechanism for SAP Business Network

question: SAP Ariba支持将公共采购公告发布到哪个经批准的外部门户网站？
context:
Support to Publish Public Procurement Notices
on an Approved External Portal
Buyers can enter procurement details in the public procurement notices associated with a public sector event and
publish the notices on the Tenders Electronic Daily (TED) portal. To publish public procurement notices to the TED
portal, the buyers can integrate SAP Ariba Strategic Sourcing Suite and Tenders Electronic Daily (TED) using SAP
Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network.
Public procurement notices contain information such as the bid items, eligibility criteria, location, time frame, and
so on. You can use the following document types to monitor public procurement notices in the Transaction Tracker
of SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network:
Notice Document Type
PriorInformationNotice
Prior Information Notice
ContractNotice
Contract Notice
ContractAwardNotice
Contract Award Notice
PINUtilities
Periodic Indicative Notice - Utilities
CNUtilities
Contract Notice - Utilities
CANUtilities
Contract Award Notice - Utilities
Corrigendum Notice (Change Notice) Corrigendum
